name: Abandoned
rules_text: During the end phase, if this model does not have more models (other than itself) it considers friendly within 3" of it than models it considers enemy, this model is dealt 2 irreducible damage. Then, if this token did not damage this model, remove this token.

name: Adaptable
rules_text: Before performing a duel, this model may remove this token to add a suit of its choice to its duel total.

name: Adversary
rules_text: Friendly models receive a (+) to attack actions targeting this model. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aetheric Surge
rules_text: This model receives +2 Skl and a suit of its choice when declaring attack actions.

name: Analyzed
rules_text: This model may not reduce damage with its abilities. Remove this token during the end phase.

name: Aura (Binding)
rules_text: Enemy models within 6" may not empower duels. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Concealment)
rules_text: The area within 2" of this model is concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Fire)
rules_text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous (Burning) terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Fumes)
rules_text: Enemy models within 3" receive a (-) to attack actions that target friendly models. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Hazardous)
rules_text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Negligent)
rules_text: Enemy models within 2" of this model that declare a non-Walk action must pass a TN 10 Wp duel or the action fails. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Poison)
rules_text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous (Poison) terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Aura (Staggered)
rules_text: When an enemy model within 2" of this model activates, it must discard a card or gain a Staggered token.

name: Backtrack
rules_text: When performing a duel, this model may remove this token before any player cheats fate. If it does so, all cards in the conflict are discarded without effect and the duel is performed again with the same modifiers. This token may not be used if there are any jokers in the conflict.

name: Badge
rules_text: When this model would be killed, it may discard a card and remove this token to heal 2.

name: Balm
rules_text: Consumed to heal. Low River Style: heals additional +1 when resolved. Keyword: Monk.

name: Blight
rules_text: This model suffers a (r) to Wp duels generated by Plague models. During the end phase, enemy models within (aura)1" gain a Blight token, then if there are no other models within 1" with a Blight token, remove this token.

name: Bog Spirit
rules_text: After this model is killed, the crew that applied this token may summon a Will o' the Wisp with 3 health into base contact.

name: Bolstered
rules_text: This model receives +1 to its Df and Wp. During the end phase, remove this token. Canceled by Injured.

name: Bounty
rules_text: Gained when enemy models interact or attack friendlies. Keyword: Frontier.

name: Brilliance
rules_text: When this model cheats fate, the crew that applied this token may remove it to deal 1 damage to this model or heal it 2.

name: Broodling
rules_text: Used by Nephilim models for summoning or growth effects. Keyword: Nephilim.

name: Burning
rules_text: During the end phase deal 1 damage to this model and enemy models in base contact with it. Then remove this token.

name: Challenged
rules_text: This model must discard a card to target any model other than the one that applied this token. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Chi
rules_text: Removed to increase duel totals by additional +1. Core resource for Monk keyword. Keyword: Monk.

name: Convert
rules_text: Marks target for conversion effects. Keyword: Resurrectionists.

name: Craven
rules_text: This model cannot declare the Interact action and is ignored for strategies and schemes. When this model ends its activation, remove this token.

name: Death
rules_text: When this model succeeds in an attack action that deals damage, it may remove this token. If it does so, the target must either discard a card, drain a (soulstone), or be killed.

name: Distracted
rules_text: When this model targets a friendly model, it must remove this token and suffer a (-) to that action's duel. Canceled by Focused.

name: Drift
rules_text: When this model activates, it may remove this token to place into base contact with a friendly Tide marker within 5".

name: Entranced
rules_text: This model's actions that target a friendly model cannot be cheated. After this model resolves an action targeting a friendly model, remove this token.

name: Exposed
rules_text: This model cannot gain cover. During the end phase, remove this token. Canceled by Hidden.

name: Familia
rules_text: When a friendly model within 6" is dealt damage, this model may remove this token to reduce that damage by 1.

name: Fast
rules_text: Increase this model's action limit by 1 (to a maximum of 3). When this model ends its activation, remove this token. Canceled by Slow.

name: Flicker
rules_text: During the end phase, kill this model. This token cannot be removed.

name: Focused
rules_text: Before performing a duel, this model may remove this token to receive a (+) to the duel. Canceled by Distracted.

name: Fragile Ego
rules_text: After another enemy model is chosen to activate, if this model has not activated this turn, the crew that applied this token may remove it to force this model to activate instead.

name: Fright
rules_text: This model considers its (warding) abilities blank. After a friendly model succeeds in a (magic) action targeting this model, it may choose to receive one additional raise; if it does, remove this token after resolving the action.

name: Frozen Solid
rules_text: This model may not be moved by enemy effects. After either this model suffers damage or an enemy model targets this model with the Interact action, remove this token (this model may target itself with the Interact action).

name: Glowy
rules_text: Attacks that target this model are unaffected by concealing terrain. During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Glutted
rules_text: Gained by consuming markers. Used as a resource for various effects. Keyword: Big Hat.

name: Graft
rules_text: During the end phase, this model may remove this token to heal 2.

name: Greedy
rules_text: Marks a model as greedy, restricting certain actions. Keyword: Resurrectionists.

name: Hastened
rules_text: This model receives +2 Sp. When this model ends its activation, remove this token. Canceled by Staggered.

name: Hidden
rules_text: This model gains cover. During the end phase, remove this token. Canceled by Exposed.

name: Hunger
rules_text: When this model ends its activation, it must deal 1 damage to another of its allies within 1" to remove this token, or deal 1 damage to itself.

name: Impact
rules_text: When this model succeeds in an attack action that deals damage, it must remove this token to deal +1 damage.

name: Improvised Part
rules_text: This model may declare tactical actions printed on the stat cards of non-master allies within 6" as if they were printed on this model's stat card. After declaring such an action, remove this token.

name: Incurable
rules_text: Prevents or restricts healing on the affected model. Keyword: various.

name: Injured
rules_text: This model suffers -1 to its Df and Wp. During the end phase, remove this token. Canceled by Bolstered.

name: Insight
rules_text: Before performing a duel, this model may remove this token to look at the top card of its fate deck and may discard it.

name: Instinct
rules_text: When this model succeeds in an attack action, it may remove this token to receive an additional raise.

name: Interesting Parts
rules_text: This model is affected by the enemy crew card as if it were a unique model allied to the enemy leader, but it may not affect or use power bars. This model considers enemy non-Scheme, non-Strategy markers to be friendly.

name: Life
rules_text: When this model suffers damage, it may remove this token. If it does so, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

name: New Blood
rules_text: This model gains the Family keyword.

name: Numb
rules_text:
This model loses its Don't Turn Your Back ability (if any) and does not prevent friendly models from declaring the Interact action due to:
■ Being engaged with this model.
■ This model being in base contact with a marker.
■ Leaving this model's engagement range.
During the end phase, remove this token.

name: Paranoia
rules_text: When this token is removed, the crew that applied it may move this model up to 4" and then make a Scheme marker into base contact with it, after resolving the current action (if any). During the end phase, this model must either discard a card or remove this token.

name: Parasite
rules_text: Allows drawing range and LoS from models with Parasite tokens. Keyword: Explorer's Society.

name: Perforated
rules_text: After this model resolves the Walk or Charge action, deal 1 damage to it per inch it moved (to a maximum of 3). Other models may target this model with the Interact action to remove this token.

name: Poison
rules_text: deals damage equal to value, then reduces by 1; does NOT self-remove

name: Promoted
rules_text: If this model is non-unique it receives +1 Skl when declaring attack actions.

name: Reload
rules_text: When a model in this models LoS ends its activation, this model may remove this token to declare a (missile) targeting that model. If it does so, no other models in this crew may use a Reload token until the next model activates.

name: Replica
rules_text: After this model discards an upgrade, it may remove this token to attach the discarded upgrade.

name: Shame
rules_text: This model cannot be targeted by the actions of other enemy models. When this model ends its activation, it may choose to deal 1 damage to itself to remove this token.

name: Shielded
rules_text: When this model is dealt non-irreducible damage, it must remove this token to reduce that damage by 1. This token may reduce damage to 0.

name: Sin
rules_text: This model must deal 1 irreducible damage to an enemy model within 6" to declare non-general actions. When this model ends its activation, remove this token.

name: Slow
rules_text: Reduce this model's action limit by 1 (to a minimum of 1). When this model ends its activation, remove this token. Canceled by Fast.

name: Spiritual Chains
rules_text: When this model flips, cheats, or discards the black joker, it is dealt 2 damage and then this token is removed.

name: Staggered
rules_text: This model suffers -2 Sp and cannot be moved by other enemy models. When this model ends its activation, remove this token. Canceled by Hastened.

name: Stunned
rules_text: This model cannot declare triggers, and it counts all (t) symbols on its card as blank. When this model ends its activation, remove this token.

name: Summon
rules_text: This model cannot declare the Interact action. This model does not infuse a (soulstone) for its crew when it is killed. This token cannot be removed.

name: Suppressed
rules_text: When this model declares a (+) action, it must drain a (+) or the action fails. After this model resolves a (+) action, remove this token.

name: Voyage
rules_text: When this model would be moved by an enemy effect, it may remove this token. If it does so, this model controls the move.
